_source: Legend in the Mist Core Rulebook — worked examples of spending Power on Effects (the 'Action Grimoire'). Effect/cost wording quoted from the rulebook; sourced via NotebookLM. Rendered in the Reference tab's Action Grimoire section, grouped by scenario.

grimoire.effect: Give yourself an advancing-up status; when you reach its Limit, you reach the top
Give the beast a friendly status

grimoire.action: ASKING ABOUT A LEGEND AT A TAVERN…
ASKING ABOUT A LEGEND AT A TAVERN…
grimoire.effect: Get a local to draw you a map (create a tag)
Use an extra feat to make the bandages hold
Extra feat: …and avoid leaving any evidence.
Extra feat: …and have the trader remember you fondly.

grimoire.effect: Grab a torch as you tumble (extra feat)
